title: woof brainstorm bundle (Stage-0 ingestion)
description: Front-matter of the resolved design document produced by the interactive `brainstorm` skill (its Contract 2). `woof brainstorm --epic N --from-bundle <path>` validates the bundle against this schema and writes it into the discovery/brainstorm/ bucket as a Stage-1 discovery source. The schema is a vendored, woof-local copy of the agent-toolkit brainstorm skill's bundle.schema.json so Woof stays standalone; keep the two in step. work_units[] is the decomposition manifest the graph carries into Definition.

tier.description: How much of the tiered template the design engaged.

mode.description: When absent, kb-topic implies general and every other tier implies sdlc.

status.description: accepted: grilled and approved for handoff. rejected: Loop 2 found a root flaw and the design returned to Loop 1 (the back-edge); woof brainstorm refuses to ingest a rejected bundle.

context_ref.description: Path to CONTEXT.md, the bundle's ubiquitous-language glossary.

adr_refs.description: Paths to ADR files recorded during Loop 2.

work_units.description: Consumer-agnostic decomposition. Woof carries these into Definition/Breakdown; may be empty for a kb-topic bundle.

bounded_context.description: The bounded context or module seam this unit belongs to, named as in the design and CONTEXT.md.
